title: Heston Blumenthal Precision by Salter Instant Read Digital Meat Thermometer – Instant Read Food Temperature Probe for Air Fryers, Cooking, Oven, BBQ, Jam & Deep Frying, 0.1°C Precision, 200°C to -45°C
features: Measure up to 5 times faster than other leading brands with the Instant Read Thermometer from Heston Blumenthal Precision by Salter.
Check meat temperatures, confectionary, barbeques, jam making and much more with the easy to hold silicone grip for added comfort.
Including a magnetic info card with Heston’s recommended temperatures so you can cook your favourite meals to perfection.
The stainless steel probe case with pocket clip add extra safety and convenient storage when not using the thermometer.
Providing ultimate precision, the bbq thermometer provides quick temperature readings to 0.1°C, with a range of 200°C to - 45°C.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Backlit, Fast Reading System, High Accuracy, Large Display, Ultra Clear Screen, Waterproof
